title: Idol Hands
description: Adds 3 new and unique Totems to spice up survival gameplay in a balanced way!
body:
Idol Hands aims to add new, balanced and unique totems to spice up survival gameplay. To accomplish this, Evokers now drop "Illager Charms" in place of Totems of Undying. With these new Charms, you can craft a plethora of unique totems, currently including:

- Totem of Undying
- Totem of Restoration
- Totem of the Phantom
- Totem of Sanctuary
- Totem of Extension
- Totem of Attraction

Each Totem has a unique use! For instance, Restoration buffs your Mending tools by using your stored XP, Sanctuary teleports you back to your spawnpoint at the cost of some HP, and Phantom gives you a brief window of spectator mode to escape an enemy, scope out an area, or quickly cross a long distance... just make sure you aren't in a block or high in the sky when it wears off! In update 1.1, the totems of Extension and Attraction were added, acting to extend your reach or pull in items respectively. 

DISCLAIMER: this mod was made with MCreator. I am currently learning to code. At some point I do plan on rewriting the mod with custom code when I am more skilled, but in the meantime MCreator allows me to quickly test and polish my ideas into functioning items.
